typecheck.description: Run TypeScript type checking on desktop

rules.noComments: Do not add comments to code unless the logic is non-obvious
rules.useThemeTokens: Use CSS custom properties (Radix Theme tokens) instead of hardcoded colors
rules.iconsInShared: All SVG icons go in shared/src/components/Icon/svgs/ with width='1em' height='1em' fill='currentColor' viewBox and xmlns
rules.moduleCSS: Use CSS Modules with .module.less extension for component styles
rules.typescriptStrict: Follow TypeScript strict mode, noUnusedLocals, noUnusedParameters
